title: Golden Canadian Cheese Casserole
description: A French-inspired casserole filled with golden cheese and tender Canadian cheese, perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.notes: whole milk or any other milk

instructions: Cook the Canadian cheese in a pan over medium heat until browned and melted, stirring occasionally.
In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the all-purpose flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Stir in the shredded Golden cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked Canadian cheese mixture to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded Melty cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
